Venue Info
Media Gallery
Credit Union 1 Amphitheatre
Tinley Park, IL
Previous Names:
New World Music Theatre (Changed after 2000)
Tweeter Center Chicago (Changed after 2005)
First Midwest Bank Amphitheatre (Changed after 2015)
Hollywood Casino Amphitheatre (Changed after 2023)
Seating Capacity: 28739
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 17
  DMB  (15)
  Dave, Roi & Stefan  (1)
  Dave solo  (1)

Longest Performance:
09.15.06 - Bartender (20:16)
Venue Picture
Description
This venue opened in 1990 as World Music Theatre and is located in the southern Chicago suburb of Tinley Park, IL.
